text: I am surrounded by the hum of innovation and inquiry. Stepping through these glass doors, I feel the sharp geometry of modernity enfolding me. The meeting rooms exude anticipation—spaces for minds to gather and ideas to spark. Inside, the colors and displays pulse with curiosity. The R+D wall reminds me of the eternal quest to reconcile knowledge and creation. I feel inspired, slightly overwhelmed by the vastness of human ambition, yet hopeful within this sanctuary of intellect and potential.
